[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0001111000 4
1 0011110101 6
2 1111110101 8
3 0100100111 5
4 0001000000 1
5 0000000000 a
6 0000000000 a
7 0000000000 a
